'''Zhotta 3''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Zhotta system/Legends|Zhotta system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]' [[Mayagil sector/Legends|Mayagil sector]].<ref name="Atlas" /> After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] sent [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] to invite the planetary leaders of this world to a [[Galactic Congress (Zhotta 3)|congress]] to determine the fate of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="marvel84" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 84|''Star Wars'' (1977) 84]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 84}} {{1stm}}
